# Vision

**specy-road** is an open, roadmap-first coordination system for AI-assisted and human teams. The **roadmap** is the primary artifact of system evolution; **purpose**, **principles**, and **enforceable constraints** stay separate; multi-agent work uses **immutable IDs**, **touch zones**, and **registration**.

Success: teams plan in depth, delegate agentic work with clear contracts, and avoid context bloat by loading only the roadmap slice and shared specs relevant to a task.

See [`constitution/purpose.md`](constitution/purpose.md) and [`constitution/principles.md`](constitution/principles.md) for the full constitution.
